# type-layers-proposal
Four draft proposals to extend Python's type system with new primitives.

**DISCLAIMER:** Yes, this proposal was written with the help of an LLM. No, it was not solely generated by one.
I (Stelar) have dyslexia. LLMs help me structure, correct, and shape my ideas into readable documents. Every technical claim, design decision, and example in these drafts has been verified and reflects my intent to the fullest possible.

| PEP | Title | Depends on |
|---|---|---|
| A | TypeVar resolution from `__class_getitem__` signatures | — |
| B | The `__annotated_*__` protocol | — |
| C | `Val` and value-level TypeVars | A |
| D | `Map` and bounded `TypeVarTuple` | A, C |

Start with PEP A — it is the most targeted and immediately actionable.

**Feedback welcome via GitHub Issues.**
